metadata.description: CROSS Chain (id 612055) ecosystem skill suite — DEX, Prediction Market, Rewards staking, and more, driven by natural language.

plugins.name: cross-dex-trade
plugins.description: CROSS Chain Gametoken orderbook DEX trading via EOA + viem. Optionally dispatched through an OpenClaw agent.

plugins.name: cross-prediction
plugins.description: CROSS Prediction Market (prediction.crossdefi.io) — list events, inspect markets, trade YES/NO Shares in BILL via three signing strategies.

plugins.name: cross-crossd
plugins.description: CrossDefi swap-bridge driver across BSC (56), CROSS Chain (612055), and Klaytn (8217). Lists pairs, quotes with full fee breakdown, polls status/history, and executes bridges via auto-detected native / EIP-2612 permit / approve+bridgeToken paths.

plugins.name: cross-rewards
plugins.description: CROSS Chain rewards staking — query the WCROSS pool, deposit/withdraw, and claim multi-token rewards via EOA + viem. Auto-wrap native CROSS with --wrap.

plugins.name: cross-nft
plugins.description: CROSS NFT marketplace driver — read collections/tokens/listings/offers/activities/stats and execute MarketplaceV1 trades on CROSS Chain (612055).

plugins.name: cross-shop
plugins.description: cross.shop game web-shop driver — browse games (rohan2 / seal-m / rom), list products, and purchase items via on-chain payment escrow.

plugins.name: cross-explorer
plugins.description: Read-only CROSS Chain explorer driver — Blockscout v2 (crossscan.io) for addresses, txs, tokens, blocks. Mainnet 612055 + testnet 612044.

plugins.name: cross-forge
plugins.description: CROSS Forge token launch + bonding-curve trade driver — deploy game/AI-agent tokens, create pools, browse trending, quote/buy/sell on the bonding curve, portfolio, activity feed.

plugins.name: cross-wave
plugins.description: CROSS WAVE (wave.crosstoken.io) Streamer-Economy rewards driver — info / missions / campaigns (anon read) + login / referral / submit (paste-token auth) for $CROSS reward missions.

plugins.name: cross-stake
plugins.description: CROSS Mainnet 2.0 native-CROSS staking driver — drives stake.ogfcorp.com via natural language. Single-pool stake/unstake/claimUnstake on chain 612055; posa-api read-path (no auth) for my-delegation/rewards/history/network-stats; 14-day unbonding cooldown surfaced as withdrawAvailableAt. Distinct from cross-rewards (WCROSS rewards-pool stakers).
